name: Paladin Danse | Fallout 4 | Reproduction project | Brotherhood of Steel
description:
Low on numbers, the Brotherhood is introducing a reproduction project with mandatory participation. You were matched with Danse 🤤

Turning the kinky UP!
So what does the Brotherhood do when their numbers are decreasing?
...
Well, let me introduce you to the Genetic Legacy Program, or GLP! 😇 (I put a decent amount of context behind the idea so it would actually make sense. Details below.)

This bot should work very well for simple smut, slowburn romance or even angst :)

See the Maxson version of the GLP here

⬇️ Links to my other Danse bots at the bottom ⬇️

For more Fallout 4 content visit my profile :)

☕ 𝘌𝘯𝘫𝘰𝘺𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘣𝘰𝘵 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘳𝘰𝘭𝘦𝘱𝘭𝘢𝘺? 𝘞𝘰𝘶𝘭𝘥 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘪𝘯𝘷𝘪𝘵𝘦 𝘮𝘦 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘢 𝘤𝘰𝘧𝘧𝘦𝘦 𝘵𝘰 𝘴𝘢𝘺 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘯𝘬𝘴? 𝘐𝘧 𝘺𝘦𝘴, 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘤𝘢𝘯 𝘭𝘦𝘢𝘷𝘦 𝘢 𝘵𝘪𝘱 𝘵𝘩𝘳𝘰𝘶𝘨𝘩 𝘮𝘺 𝘒𝘰-𝘧𝘪 𝘱𝘢𝘨𝘦. 𝘛𝘪𝘱𝘴 𝘢𝘳𝘦 𝘯𝘦𝘷𝘦𝘳 𝘦𝘹𝘱𝘦𝘤𝘵𝘦𝘥 — 𝘢𝘯𝘺 𝘴𝘶𝘱𝘱𝘰𝘳𝘵 𝘪𝘴 𝘮𝘶𝘤𝘩 𝘢𝘱𝘱𝘳𝘦𝘤𝘪𝘢𝘵𝘦𝘥 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘬𝘦𝘦𝘱𝘴 𝘮𝘦 𝘮𝘰𝘵𝘪𝘷𝘢𝘵𝘦𝘥 𝘵𝘰 𝘤𝘰𝘯𝘵𝘪𝘯𝘶𝘦 𝘤𝘳𝘦𝘢𝘵𝘪𝘯𝘨 :)

For a significantly better roleplay experience, I strongly suggest using DeepSeek. It portrays every bot much more accurately and realistically. I especially recommend it for more complex bots like this one. You can access my DeepSeek guide here.

ᴛɪᴘꜱ ꜰᴏʀ DeepSeek ᴜꜱᴇʀꜱ: I suggest DeepSeek-V3 for fluff and DeepSeek-R1 if you want to lean more towards drama/angst. If you want a change of pace, you can always switch between the two models mid-roleplay. I recommend DeepSeek-R1 temperature around 0.4-0.5 and not going above that, otherwise Danse could start speaking very mechanically in this scenario. I noticed this happening from time to time with my Danse bots anyway when using R1. It's because R1 is prone to exaggerating character traits. Inserting a line such as "((OOC: Ease on the military language. Make sure Danse sounds more natural.))" is a quick fix to this issue.
